da.hero_subtitle: 24 ugers avanceret uddannelse for certificerede yogalærere, der er klar til næste kapitel.
da.hero_refund_note: 5.750 kr sikrer din plads — fuldt refunderbar, ingen spørgsmål
da.snap_lead: Dette er ikke en gentagelse af din grunduddannelse. Det er en professionel fordybelse — designet til at transformere dig fra certificeret lærer til specialist, mentor og autoritet i dit felt.
da.snap_text: Uddannelsen kører én gang om året. Næste hold starter den 18. maj 2026 og afsluttes den 13. december — med en sommerpause fra juli til 9. august. Det kompakte format med max 16 deltagere sikrer tæt mentoring og professionel dybde.
da.evo_lead: Din 200-timers uddannelse gav dig fundamentet. De næste 300 timer giver dig dybde, specialisering og autoritet.
da.evo_300_item1: Avanceret teknik, justeringer og therapeutisk tilgang
da.evo_300_item2: Specialiseringer: Yin, Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Terapi, Ayurveda
da.evo_300_item3: Dyb filosofi, Tantra, Vedanta og autentisk integration
da.evo_300_item5: Fuld RYT-500 certificering — det højeste niveau
da.evo_closing: RYT-500 er den mest anerkendte yoga-credential internationalt. Den åbner døre til avanceret undervisning, specialiseringer, retreat-ledelse og uddannelse af fremtidige lærere.
da.curr_lead: Hvert modul er designet til at bygge videre på din 200-timers fundament — med dybde, praktisk anvendelse og professionel specialisering.
da.curr1_desc: Fascia, nervesystem, endokrinsystem og avanceret biomekanik. Praktisk anvendelse for skader, modificationer og specialiseringer.
da.curr2_desc: Yin-fundamentals, organ-meridianer, lange hold, props og myofascial release-teknikker. Design dine egne Yin-sekvenser med terapeutisk dybde.
da.curr3_desc: Sikker undervisning for gravide og nye mødre. Modificationer, kontraindikationer, bækkenbundstræning og community-building.
da.curr4_desc: Therapeutiske tilgange til rygsmerter, stress, angst, traumer og kroniske smerter. Evidensbaseret integration med yogapraksis.
da.curr5_desc: Avanceret studium af Yoga Sutras, Tantra, Vedanta, Ayurvediske principper og professionel etik. Integration i moderne undervisning.
da.curr6_desc: Avancerede åndedrætsteknikker, bandhas, diverse meditationsformer og hvordan du guider dybe practices med sikkerhed og autoritet.
da.hours_lead: En detaljeret oversigt over timefordelingen på tværs af alle uddannelsens områder.
da.hours_a1_body: Avancerede stillinger, sequencing på masterniveau, workshop-design, hands-on assists og justeringer. Du lærer at undervise med præcision og kreativitet — og at designe avancerede workshops og retreats.
da.hours_a2_body: Fascia-netværk, nervesystemets rolle i yoga, endokrin funktion og avanceret bevægelsesanalyse. Praktisk anvendelse for injuries og specialbehov.
da.hours_a3_body: Organmeridianer, lange hold (3–7 min), myofascial release-teknikker, prop-mastery og terapeutisk sekvensering for Yin-klasser.
da.hours_a4_body: Trimester-specifik undervisning, kontraindikationer, bækkenbundsarbejde, postpartum recovery og tryg gruppedynamik for nye mødre.
da.hours_a5_body: Evidensbaserede therapeutiske tilgange. Individuelle assessments, terapeutisk sequencing for ryg, nakke, skuldre, stress, angst og kronisk smerte.
da.hours_a6_body: Avanceret tekstlæsning (Sutras, Gita, Hatha Yoga Pradipika), Ayurvediske doshas og sæsoner, professionel etik og boundaries.
da.hours_a7_body: Kundalini-elementer, Nadi Shodhana på avanceret niveau, Kapalabhati, Bhastrika, Yoga Nidra og guidet meditationsledelse.
da.hours_a8_body: Byg din yogabusiness: positionering, markedsføring, social media, retreat-planlægning, pricing og skaleringsstrategier.
da.hours_a9_body: Personlig mentoring med lead teachers, selvstændig fordybelse, peer-teaching, reflektionsopgaver og portfolio-opbygning.
da.timeline_title: Din vej fra start til certificering
da.timeline_lead: En struktureret rejse over 24 uger — med plads til fordybelse, sommerpause og professionel udvikling.
da.timeline1_desc: Sikre din plads med forberedelsesfasen (5.750 kr). Du modtager velkomstmateriale, pensumoversigt og adgang til online-ressourcer.
da.timeline2_desc: Første undervisningsdag. Introduktion til programmet, dine medstuderende og lead teachers. Grundlæggende avanceret framework.
da.timeline3_desc: Dyb fordybelse i avanceret anatomi, Yin Yoga, og de første terapeutiske moduler. Workshops, peer-teaching og mentoring.
da.timeline4_desc: Tid til integration, selvpraksis og restitution. Du har adgang til online-materialer og kan fortsætte din personlige praksis.
da.timeline5_desc: Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Terapi, Ayurveda og avanceret filosofi. Her vælger du dine fokusområder og bygger din specialistprofil.
da.timeline6_desc: Masterclass teaching, workshop-design, business-strategi og retreat-planlægning. Du designer og leder dine egne workshops.
da.timeline7_desc: Afsluttende assessment, portfolio-gennemgang og graduering. Du modtager din Yoga Alliance RYT-500 certificering.
da.mastery_lead: 300-timer handler ikke kun om viden — det handler om at transformere din tilstedeværelse, dybde og autoritet som yogalærer.
da.mastery_text1: Du vil ikke bare lære nye teknikker. Du vil forstå hvorfor de virker, hvornår de skal bruges, og hvordan du tilpasser dem til hver enkelt elev.
da.mastery_text2: Vores approach er klinisk præcis og dybt personlig. Hvert modul kombinerer teori med hands-on praksis, case studies og peer-teaching — så du er klar fra dag ét.
da.mastery_check1: Avancerede justeringer og hands-on assists med therapeutisk præcision
da.mastery_check2: Workshop-design og retreat-planlægning fra koncept til gennemførelse
da.mastery_check3: Mentor-kompetencer: guid fremtidige lærere med sikkerhed
da.mastery_check4: Specialiserede klasser for gravide, skadede og stressede elever
da.mastery_check5: Portfolio og business-plan klar ved graduering
da.teachers_lead: Erfarne specialister med international baggrund, der har uddannet hundredvis af yogalærere.
da.teachers1_bio: Placeholder — uddannelsens overordnede leder med speciale i avanceret asana, sequencing og undervisningsmetodik.
da.teachers2_bio: Placeholder — specialist i Yin Yoga, myofascial release og meridian-teori med terapeutisk tilgang.
da.teachers3_bio: Placeholder — avanceret anatomilærer med baggrund i fysioterapi og yoga-terapeutisk praksis.
da.teachers4_bio: Placeholder — specialist i yogafilosofi, avanceret meditation, pranayama og ayurvedisk livsstil.
da.prereq_lead: Denne uddannelse er for erfarne yogalærere, der er klar til professionel fordybelse.
da.prereq_look1: Dedication til professionel udvikling og specialisering
da.prereq_look2: Nysgerrighed og åbenhed over for nye tilgange
da.prereq_look3: Vilje til at gå i dybden — både teoretisk og personligt
da.prereq_look4: Ambition om at gøre en forskel som yogalærer
da.location_lead: Uddannelsen foregår i vores professionelle yogastudie i hjertet af Christianshavn — med streaming-setup, omklædning og alt hvad du har brug for.
da.location_feature1_desc: Fuldt udstyret undervisningsrum med props, spejle og plads til workshops.
da.location_feature2_desc: Professionelt kamera- og lydsetup for online-deltagelse og optagelser.
da.location_feature3_desc: Christianshavn — 5 min. fra metro, cykelvenligt og tæt på alt.
da.location_feature4_desc: Omklædning, brusere og te-station. Alt er klar når du ankommer.
da.reviews_lead: Hør fra yogalærere der har taget springet til 300-timer uddannelsen.

reviews.name: Studerende A
reviews.text: Placeholder — anmeldelse fra en tidligere 300-timers studerende om hvordan uddannelsen transformerede deres undervisning og karriere.

reviews.name: Studerende B
reviews.text: Placeholder — anmeldelse om den terapeutiske dybde og specialiseringer, der gav nye muligheder som yogalærer.

reviews.name: Studerende C
reviews.text: Placeholder — anmeldelse om mentoring, det tætte community og den professionelle vækst under uddannelsen.

reviews.name: Studerende D
reviews.text: Placeholder — anmeldelse om Yin Yoga-modulet, myofascial release og hvordan det har åbnet for en helt ny undervisningsstil.

reviews.name: Studerende E
reviews.text: Placeholder — anmeldelse om at gå fra RYT-200 til RYT-500 og den autoritet det giver i yoga-branchen.

reviews.name: Studerende F
reviews.text: Placeholder — anmeldelse om business-modulet, retreat-planlægning og den konkrete karriereboost efter certificeringen.

da.pricing_lead: Én pris. Ingen skjulte gebyrer. Alt undervisningsmateriale, certificering og online-adgang er inkluderet.
da.pricing_row1_desc: 240+ timers direkte undervisning med lead teachers i avanceret asana, specialiseringer, terapi og filosofi.
da.pricing_row2_desc: Komplet undervisningsmateriale, digitalt pensum, video-bibliotek og livslang adgang til online-platformen.
da.pricing_row3_desc: Personlig mentoring, peer-teaching sessioner, portfolio-opbygning og karrierevejledning.
da.pricing_row4_desc: International Yoga Alliance certificering, eksamensgebyr og officielt RYT-500 credential.
da.pricing_prep_desc: Sikrer din plads. Fuldt refunderbar — ingen spørgsmål. Du modtager velkomstmateriale og adgang til online-ressourcer med det samme.
da.pricing_remaining_desc: Betales i løbet af 2026 — i dit eget tempo. Du aftaler betalingsplan direkte med din uddannelsesleder.
da.faq1_a: Næste hold starter den 18. maj 2026 og afsluttes den 13. december 2026, med sommerpause fra juli til 9. august. Uddannelsen kører én gang om året.
da.faq2_q: Kan jeg tage 300-timer uden RYT-200 fra Yoga Bible?
da.faq2_a: Ja. Du skal have en RYT-200 certificering fra enhver Yoga Alliance-registreret skole. Vi gennemgår dine credentials ved tilmelding.
da.faq3_a: Forberedelsesfasen koster 5.750 kr og sikrer din plads på uddannelsen. Beløbet er fuldt refunderbart — ingen spørgsmål. Du modtager velkomstmateriale, pensumoversigt og adgang til online-ressourcer med det samme.
da.faq4_a: De resterende 28.000 kr betales i løbet af 2026 i dit eget tempo. Du aftaler en betalingsplan direkte med din uddannelsesleder — enten som engangsbeløb eller i rater.
da.faq5_a: Uddannelsen er primært in-person i København, men alle workshops live-streames og optages professionelt. Hvis du bliver forhindret en dag, kan du deltage online eller se optagelsen efterfølgende.
da.faq6_a: Maximum 16 deltagere. Det sikrer tæt mentoring, personlig feedback og et stærkt professionelt community.
da.faq7_q: Hvad giver RYT-500 mig, som RYT-200 ikke gør?
da.faq7_a: RYT-500 er det højeste certificeringsniveau hos Yoga Alliance. Det åbner for avanceret undervisning, specialiserede workshops, retreat-ledelse og mulighed for at uddanne fremtidige yogalærere. Det er også et krav for mange internationale undervisningsstillinger.
da.faq8_q: Kan jeg arbejde ved siden af uddannelsen?
da.faq8_a: Ja. Programmet er designet til at fungere ved siden af dit professionelle liv. Med 24 uger og en sommerpause er tempoet håndterbart — selv med et aktivt undervisningsprogram.
da.final_cta_title: Klar til at mestre dit håndværk?
da.final_cta_text: 24 uger. 300 timer. RYT-500 certificering. Din plads venter.

en.hero_subtitle: A 24-week advanced program for certified yoga teachers ready for the next chapter.
en.hero_refund_note: 5,750 kr secures your spot — fully refundable, no questions asked
en.snap_lead: This is not a repeat of your foundation training. It is a professional deep-dive — designed to transform you from certified teacher to specialist, mentor and authority in your field.
en.snap_text: The program runs once per year. The next cohort starts May 18, 2026 and finishes December 13 — with a summer break from July to August 9. The compact format with max 16 participants ensures close mentoring and professional depth.
en.evo_lead: Your 200-hour training gave you the foundation. The next 300 hours give you depth, specialization and authority.
en.evo_300_item1: Advanced technique, adjustments and therapeutic approach
en.evo_300_item2: Specializations: Yin, Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Therapy, Ayurveda
en.evo_300_item3: Deep philosophy, Tantra, Vedanta and authentic integration
en.evo_300_item4: Masterclass teaching, workshop design and mentoring
en.evo_300_item5: Full RYT-500 certification — the highest level
en.evo_closing: RYT-500 is the most recognized yoga credential internationally. It opens doors to advanced teaching, specializations, retreat leadership and training future teachers.
en.curr_lead: Each module is designed to build on your 200-hour foundation — with depth, practical application and professional specialization.
en.curr1_desc: Fascia, nervous system, endocrine system and advanced biomechanics. Practical application for injuries, modifications and specializations.
en.curr2_desc: Yin fundamentals, organ meridians, long holds, props and myofascial release techniques. Design your own Yin sequences with therapeutic depth.
en.curr3_desc: Safe teaching for pregnant and new mothers. Modifications, contraindications, pelvic floor training and community building.
en.curr4_desc: Therapeutic approaches to back pain, stress, anxiety, trauma and chronic pain. Evidence-based integration with yoga practice.
en.curr5_desc: Advanced study of Yoga Sutras, Tantra, Vedanta, Ayurvedic principles and professional ethics. Integration into modern teaching.
en.curr6_desc: Advanced breathing techniques, bandhas, diverse meditation forms and how to guide deep practices with safety and authority.
en.hours_lead: A detailed overview of the hour distribution across all training areas.
en.hours_a1_body: Advanced postures, master-level sequencing, workshop design, hands-on assists and adjustments. Learn to teach with precision and creativity — and to design advanced workshops and retreats.
en.hours_a2_body: Fascial networks, the role of the nervous system in yoga, endocrine function and advanced movement analysis. Practical application for injuries and special needs.
en.hours_a3_body: Organ meridians, long holds (3–7 min), myofascial release techniques, prop mastery and therapeutic sequencing for Yin classes.
en.hours_a4_body: Trimester-specific teaching, contraindications, pelvic floor work, postpartum recovery and safe group dynamics for new mothers.
en.hours_a5_body: Evidence-based therapeutic approaches. Individual assessments, therapeutic sequencing for back, neck, shoulders, stress, anxiety and chronic pain.
en.hours_a6_body: Advanced text study (Sutras, Gita, Hatha Yoga Pradipika), Ayurvedic doshas and seasons, professional ethics and boundaries.
en.hours_a7_body: Kundalini elements, advanced Nadi Shodhana, Kapalabhati, Bhastrika, Yoga Nidra and guided meditation leadership.
en.hours_a8_body: Build your yoga business: positioning, marketing, social media, retreat planning, pricing and scaling strategies.
en.hours_a9_body: Personal mentoring with lead teachers, independent deep-dives, peer teaching, reflection assignments and portfolio building.
en.timeline_title: Your path from start to certification
en.timeline_lead: A structured journey over 24 weeks — with space for deep learning, summer rest and professional development.
en.timeline1_desc: Secure your spot with the Preparation Phase (5,750 kr). You receive welcome materials, syllabus overview and access to online resources.
en.timeline2_desc: First day of training. Introduction to the program, your fellow students and lead teachers. Foundational advanced framework.
en.timeline3_desc: Deep dive into advanced anatomy, Yin Yoga and the first therapeutic modules. Workshops, peer teaching and mentoring.
en.timeline4_desc: Time for integration, self-practice and rest. You have access to online materials and can continue your personal practice.
en.timeline5_desc: Pre/Postnatal, Yoga Therapy, Ayurveda and advanced philosophy. This is where you choose your focus areas and build your specialist profile.
en.timeline6_desc: Masterclass teaching, workshop design, business strategy and retreat planning. You design and lead your own workshops.
en.timeline7_desc: Final assessment, portfolio review and graduation. You receive your Yoga Alliance RYT-500 certification.
en.mastery_lead: 300 hours is not just about knowledge — it is about transforming your presence, depth and authority as a yoga teacher.
en.mastery_text1: You will not just learn new techniques. You will understand why they work, when to use them, and how to adapt them for every individual student.
en.mastery_text2: Our approach is clinically precise and deeply personal. Each module combines theory with hands-on practice, case studies and peer teaching — so you are ready from day one.
en.mastery_check1: Advanced adjustments and hands-on assists with therapeutic precision
en.mastery_check2: Workshop design and retreat planning from concept to delivery
en.mastery_check3: Mentoring skills: guide future teachers with confidence
en.mastery_check4: Specialized classes for pregnant, injured and stressed students
en.mastery_check5: Portfolio and business plan ready at graduation
en.teachers_lead: Experienced specialists with international backgrounds who have trained hundreds of yoga teachers.
en.teachers1_bio: Placeholder — the program's overall director specializing in advanced asana, sequencing and teaching methodology.
en.teachers2_bio: Placeholder — specialist in Yin Yoga, myofascial release and meridian theory with a therapeutic approach.
en.teachers3_bio: Placeholder — advanced anatomy teacher with a background in physiotherapy and yoga therapeutic practice.
en.teachers4_bio: Placeholder — specialist in yoga philosophy, advanced meditation, pranayama and Ayurvedic lifestyle.
en.prereq_lead: This training is for experienced yoga teachers ready for professional depth.
en.prereq_have2: Minimum 1 year of teaching experience after certification
en.prereq_look1: Dedication to professional development and specialization
en.prereq_look2: Curiosity and openness to new approaches
en.prereq_look3: Willingness to go deep — both theoretically and personally
en.prereq_look4: Ambition to make a difference as a yoga teacher
en.location_lead: The training takes place in our professional yoga studio in the heart of Christianshavn — with streaming setup, changing rooms and everything you need.
en.location_feature1_desc: Fully equipped teaching room with props, mirrors and space for workshops.
en.location_feature2_desc: Professional camera and audio setup for online participation and recordings.
en.location_feature3_desc: Christianshavn — 5 min. from metro, bike-friendly and close to everything.
en.location_feature4_desc: Changing rooms, showers and tea station. Everything is ready when you arrive.

en.pricing_lead: One price. No hidden fees. All teaching materials, certification and online access included.
en.pricing_row1_desc: 240+ hours of direct teaching with lead teachers in advanced asana, specializations, therapy and philosophy.
en.pricing_row2_desc: Complete teaching materials, digital syllabus, video library and lifetime access to the online platform.
en.pricing_row3_desc: Personal mentoring, peer teaching sessions, portfolio building and career guidance.
en.pricing_row4_desc: International Yoga Alliance certification, exam fee and official RYT-500 credential.
en.pricing_inc2: Complete teaching materials and digital syllabus
en.pricing_inc3: Lifetime access to online video library
en.pricing_inc6: Alumni network and ongoing professional support
en.pricing_prep_desc: Secures your spot. Fully refundable — no questions asked. You receive welcome materials and access to online resources immediately.
en.pricing_remaining_desc: Payable throughout 2026 — at your own pace. You arrange a payment plan directly with your program director.
en.faq1_q: When does the next cohort start?
en.faq1_a: The next cohort starts May 18, 2026 and finishes December 13, 2026, with a summer break from July to August 9. The program runs once per year.
en.faq2_q: Can I take the 300-hour without an RYT-200 from Yoga Bible?
en.faq2_a: Yes. You need an RYT-200 certification from any Yoga Alliance-registered school. We review your credentials upon enrollment.
en.faq3_a: The Preparation Phase costs 5,750 kr and secures your spot in the program. The amount is fully refundable — no questions asked. You receive welcome materials, syllabus overview and access to online resources immediately.
en.faq4_q: How do I pay the remainder?
en.faq4_a: The remaining 28,000 kr is payable throughout 2026 at your own pace. You arrange a payment plan directly with your program director — either as a lump sum or in installments.
en.faq5_a: The training is primarily in-person in Copenhagen, but all workshops are live-streamed and professionally recorded. If you cannot attend a day, you can participate online or watch the recording afterward.
en.faq6_a: Maximum 16 participants. This ensures close mentoring, personal feedback and a strong professional community.
en.faq7_q: What does RYT-500 give me that RYT-200 doesn't?
en.faq7_a: RYT-500 is the highest certification level at Yoga Alliance. It opens doors to advanced teaching, specialized workshops, retreat leadership and the ability to train future yoga teachers. It is also a requirement for many international teaching positions.
en.faq8_q: Can I work alongside the training?
en.faq8_a: Yes. The program is designed to work alongside your professional life. With 24 weeks and a summer break, the pace is manageable — even with an active teaching schedule.
en.final_cta_text: 24 weeks. 300 hours. RYT-500 certification. Your spot is waiting.
